mapper.insert: INSERT INTO equipment (equipment_id, name, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{equipmentId}, #{name}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE equipment SET name = #{name}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE equipment_id = #{equipmentId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT equipment_id, name, equipment_type, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM equipment WHERE equipment_id = #{equipmentId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM equipment WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT ( (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM equipment_moveout WHERE equipment_id = #{equipmentId}) + (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM equipment_storage WHERE equipment_id = #{equipmentId}) )
